_comment: Memory-quality regression scenarios (design 2.4, LoCoMo/LongMemEval-style categories). Extend this file whenever memory/, signals.py, or the consolidation prompt changes behavior: seed memories (optionally split across sessions), ask the query, assert the expectation. The knowledge-update category is procedural (needs a consolidation run) and lives in test_memory_quality.py directly.

scenarios.name: project fact retrievable by project name
sessions: Priya is the PM for Project Falcon

scenarios.name: facts from different sessions both retrievable
sessions: The user never takes calls before 9am
The user prefers Friday afternoons kept free of meetings

scenarios.name: later session does not shadow earlier facts
sessions: Sam owns the Q3 budget review

scenarios.name: correction-derived preference retrievable at draft time
sessions: Prefers short replies without throat-clearing to external vendors
scenarios.query: how should replies to vendors be written
